title: Campus Life
content:
Campus Life

A Center Blending Science and Life…

A new university campus meeting all the needs of academics, researchers, and students rises in Elmalıkent, Ümraniye, adorned with neo-classical buildings and a spacious, unique landscape area, in an easily accessible location in Istanbul.

The main Ümraniye Elmalıkent campus of Istanbul 29 Mayıs University is located right next to the Şile highway, Üsküdar-Ümraniye-Çekmeköy subway line, and Ümraniye Research Hospital. At a close distance to the Bosphorus and FSM bridges, TEM and E-5 highways and other link roads, the new campus is also just one-ride away from Ümraniye, Üsküdar, and Kadıköy districts.

A new vision, a different future…

Modern five-floor faculty buildings in the new Elmalıkent campus are designed to achieve our mission and vision goals to become an internationally acclaimed education and research center.

Classrooms and Seminar Halls

Conference rooms, lecture halls and classrooms that are equipped with smart boards, overhead projectors, and computers in the new campus are designed for scientific and cultural activities. The Elmalıkent campus also accommodates special facilities for student club activities and computer laboratories.

A library that is open also to researchers from other universities and research centers

As an accessible science and research compound with all the necessary technical equipment, our library is open not only to our faculty members and students, but also to all researchers.

Istanbul 29 Mayıs University library promises our students a spacious place to study with a collection of about 80,000 books on various subjects in social sciences and humanities.

What’s more, our faculty members and students have the opportunity to benefit from the library of İSAM (Center for Islamic Studies) in the Altunizade campus, unquestionably the best specialized library in its field which boasts a vast collection of books and periodicals in social sciences.

Center for quality education…

Our institutes, School of Foreign Languages, and research centers are specially fashioned for a high-quality education and innovative research.

For a better civilization and future…

The cultural center with its multi-purpose conference halls will play an important role in university’s cultural activities.

Our one-of-a-kind landscape with spacious walking and resting areas will inspire the faculty members and students to produce unique thoughts and values in the heart of nature.

Details are important…

Our modern campus is designed in minute detail to satisfy all the needs of campus life with a large canteen, a dining hall, a sports center, and parking lots.
